heading: Immunity of United States Government
label: 90110 Immunity of United States Government
text: The United States Government is not liable for any debts, defaults, acts, or omissions of the foundation. The full faith and credit of the Government does not extend to any obligation of the foundation.
notes: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152610 of this title
amendments: Amendments2014— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 113–237section 152610 of this title
